title: Gunpowder Recipe Mod
description: Craft gunpowder using coal, flint, bone meal, and redstone, enhancing crafting convenience and opening up new gameplay strategies in Minecraft.
body:
# 📑 Description

Craft gunpowder using coal, flint, bone meal, and redstone at your crafting table. This mod offers a convenient alternative to hunting creepers or searching dungeons for gunpowder. Explore new strategies for mining, combat, and exploration with this simple yet effective addition to your Minecraft experience. Craft explosives, fireworks, and more without the need to scavenge for resources.

**For the Fabric version, remember to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# ⚙️ Recipes

![Recipes of gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e624fa04fd9339cd7b5a318b794b73bb92540ffe.png)
